news.headline: Trump’s Gulf dealmaker aids family in profiting from property boom.
Terreno Realty Corp. buys Long Island City property in Queens, NY for $7.6M.
news.summary: A recent acquisition by Terreno Realty Corporation in Long Island City, Queens, NY has been finalized for a total of $7.6 million. This property purchase in Bellevue, Washington marks a significant investment for the corporation, showcasing their commitment to expanding their real estate portfolio. This strategic move demonstrates their intent to capitalize on the growing market opportunities in the area, indicating a positive outlook for future development and growth prospects in Queens.

news.headline: Medscape & HIMSS release 2024 report on AI adoption in healthcare, revealing current state and future expectations. #HealthTech
news.summary: A recent study unveiled the present status and future projections of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the healthcare sector. Medscape and Healthcare Information and Management Systems Society (HIMSS) disclosed their collaborative research titled "Early Successes," on Dec. 6, 2024, in Newark, N.J. The study sheds light on key insights regarding AI's utilization in healthcare, garnering significant attention with its detailed analysis of the sector. This research initiative signifies an important step in understanding the evolving role of AI in healthcare, with implications for the industry's growth and development moving forward.

news.headline: Ideal Power to join iAccess Alpha Buyside Best Ideas Winter Investor Conference on Dec 10-11, 2024.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on December 6, 2024, Ideal Power Inc. (Nasdaq: IPWR) introduced the B-TRAN® bidirectional semiconductor power switch. Known for its efficiency and broad patent coverage, the company is leading the way in its development and commercialization efforts.

news.headline: Smart Communications recognized as a leader in IDC MarketScape for Intelligent CCM & Automated Doc Generation in 2024.
news.summary: In a recent report by IDC, a renowned research firm, Smart Communications™, a prominent technology company specializing in revolutionizing customer interactions, was awarded the title of 'Leader'. The recognition was conferred upon Smart Communications™ in two categories. Firstly, in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Intelligent Customer Communications Management 2024 Vendor Assessment (doc # US51359124, December 2024) and also in the IDC MarketScape: Automated Document Generation and Customer Communications Management 2024 Vendor Assessment. This acknowledgment solidifies the position of Smart Communications™ as a pioneering entity in the realm of customer communication technologies for the upcoming years.

news.headline: BlackRock's substantial investment in GIP gains attention, propelling Fink's company into the spotlight.
Organigram buys Motif for $90 million, becoming Canada's largest cannabis company by market share.
news.summary: In Toronto, Organigram Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: OGI) (TSX: OGI), a top cannabis producer, has successfully acquired all shares of Motif Labs Ltd. for $90 million. The acquisition includes $50 million in cash and $40 million worth of Organigram common shares, priced according to a 30-day trading VWAP of $2.3210 on the Toronto Stock Exchange (“TSX”). This deal gives Organigram full ownership of Motif and strengthens its presence in the cannabis market.

news.headline: US Bitcoin ETFs have surpassed the holdings of Satoshi Nakamoto, with over 1.1 million BTC combined.
news.summary: Collectively, US spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) now possess a greater amount of Bitcoin compared to the estimated holdings of the anonymous creator of Bitcoin, Satoshi Nakamoto. This marks a significant milestone in the cryptocurrency market, with the total amount of Bitcoin in these ETFs exceeding the presumed holdings of the mysterious figure behind the creation of Bitcoin.

news.headline: Milwaukee's Bay View Packing Company and Badger Ham team up to introduce Pickled Cubed Ham, a novel product in the pickled food market.
news.summary: Milwaukee on December 6, 2024 - In an exciting development, two renowned Wisconsin companies, Bay View Brand and Badger Ham, have joined forces to launch a unique product in the pickled food sector: Pickled Cubed Ham. This innovative collaboration combines Bay View Brand's extensive heritage in the industry with Badger Ham's expertise to introduce a new offering to consumers.

news.headline: Vanguard announces allocation changes for Vanguard STAR Fund (VGSTX) to improve outcomes for investors.
news.summary: In Valley Forge, Pennsylvania, on December 6, 2024, Vanguard revealed plans to adjust the equity and fixed income allocations within the Vanguard STAR Fund (VGSTX). These modifications are aimed at enhancing investor outcomes in the long run by introducing more balance to the fund's equity component.

news.headline: November's employment report shows a perfect balance.
Bank of America clients get PazeSM for quick online shopping with tokenization. All eligible cards now include this feature.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on December 6, 2024, Bank of America has announced the integration of PazeSM, an efficient online checkout tool, into all qualifying credit and debit cards just in time for the holiday season. Paze features card tokenization, ensuring the security of a user's full 16-digit credit or debit card information during online transactions.

news.headline: Unit Corporation declares $1.25 quarterly cash dividend per share for Q4 2024 and $2.00 special cash dividend per share.
news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) revealed that its board of directors has approved two cash dividends. The first is a quarterly dividend of $1.25 per share of common stock for Q4 2024, scheduled for payment on December 27, 2024, to shareholders on record as of December 17, 2024. The second is a special dividend of $2.00 per share of common stock, also slated for payment on December 27, 2024, to shareholders on record at the same time.

AppDirect named Leader in Forrester Marketplace Development Platforms report, scoring highest in 25 criteria, Q4 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, AppDirect, a prominent B2B commerce platform, revealed that it has achieved the status of Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Marketplace Development Platforms, Q4 2024 report. This recognition was based on scoring the highest in the current offering and strategy segments. The assessment, which examined nine leading marketplace platform providers, identified AppDirect as a Leader, with a perfect score in 25 criteria. These criteria encompassed various aspects such as customer experience front end, customer success program, search functionality, and promotion strategies.

It covers various aspects such as quantum cybersecurity, sensors, networks, and computing. news.headline: Indian single malt Godawan launched in UK by Diageo India, most awarded single malt, highly anticipated debut.
news.summary: In London, Godawan Artisanal Indian Single Malt, which is Diageo India's most awarded Single Malt, has made its highly anticipated debut in the United Kingdom. With numerous accolades to its name, this premium spirit is now available to consumers in the UK, marking a significant milestone for the brand. The move signifies the increasing global presence of Indian spirits in the market, with Godawan poised to make a mark in the competitive industry. Cheers to this exciting development for Diageo India, as they bring their acclaimed Single Malt to a new audience in the UK.

news.headline: Spreetail reports record-breaking Black Friday and Cyber Monday with $10.8 billion spent online, 40% growth over previous year.
news.summary: Spreetail, a prominent ecommerce marketplace accelerator for oversized products, experienced its most successful Black Friday and Cyber Monday to date. The company reported a 40% increase over the previous year's "Turkey 12" (T12) in 2023. According to Adobe Analytics, online consumers set a new record by spending $10.8 billion on Black Friday 2024, reflecting a 10.2% surge from the previous year. This upward trajectory persisted through the weekend and culminated in Cyber Monday, where total consumer spending reached significant levels.

news.headline: Barbara Sinatra Children's Center partners with Marcus Theatres and William Daniels for holiday child safety campaign.
news.summary: Revered actor William Daniels has taken on a leading role in a public service announcement dedicated to raising awareness about child abuse. The campaign was launched by the Barbara Sinatra Children's Center (BSCC) in Rancho Mirage, California on December 6, 2024. This initiative aims to shed light on the issue of child abuse, particularly during times of increased risk. Through this partnership, important information about child abuse prevention is being disseminated to the public, with the goal of protecting vulnerable children.

news.headline: Abraham Bolden, ex-Secret Service agent appointed by JFK, honored with CAPA 2024 "Profile in Courage" Award.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 6, 2024, former U.S. Secret Service Agent Abraham Bolden was awarded the "Profile in Courage" Award by Citizens Against Political Assassinations (CAPA) for 2024. Bolden, who was personally selected by President John F. Kennedy, received this prestigious honor.

news.headline: Middlefield Global Real Asset Fund merges with Real Estate Split Corp, exchanging each Real Asset unit into 0.36409573 units of Real Estate Split. Approximately 1,054,761 Preferred Shares and Class A Shares were issued. Real Asset units delisted on TSX. No action needed for Real Asset unitholders to receive new shares.
news.summary: Real Estate Split Corp. (TSX: RS, TSX: RS.PR.A) has successfully merged with Middlefield Global Real Asset Fund (TSX: RA.UN) on December 6, 2024. Following the merger, Real Estate Split is the continuing fund. Each Real Asset unit has been exchanged into 0.36409573 units of Real Estate Split, consisting of one Preferred Share and one Class A Share. The exchange ratio was determined based on the net asset value per unit of Real Asset on December 5, 2024, divided by the net asset value per Unit of Real Estate Split Corp. A total of approximately 1,054,761 Preferred Shares and 1,054,761 Class A shares of Real Estate Split were issued as part of the merger transaction. Real Asset units were delisted from the TSX at the close of business on December 5th. Unitholders of Real Asset are not required to take any action to receive their Preferred Shares and Class A Shares of Real Estate Split.

Rio Tinto shows commitment to gender equality by supporting organizations fighting domestic violence in Canada.
news.summary: On the National Day of Remembrance and Action on Violence Against Women, Rio Tinto in Montreal is strengthening its pledge to combat domestic violence by extending assistance to local Canadian organizations. As part of the 16 Days of Activism against Gender-Based Violence, the company will continue its partnership with groups offering shelters, counseling, education, and training for individuals impacted by domestic and family violence. This initiative marks Rio Tinto's fifth consecutive year supporting programs aimed at aiding women, children, and other affected individuals across Canada.
